节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Register callbacks to observe ArkUI behavior.
When back press event happened in NavDestination.
When back press event happened in the router page.
Auto-generated navDestination id, which is different from common property id of Component.
The uniqueId of the scrollable component.
The index of TabContent in Tabs.
The last focus index of TabContent in Tabs.
The context of the changed router page.
The index of the changed router page in router stack.
The name of the changed router page.
The path of the changed router page.
The state of the changed router page.
The unique identifier of the router page.
The size of the router page.
The context of the changed screen density.
Defines the window size layout breakpoint information. This class provides the current breakpoint classification of the window's width and height based on the configured breakpoint thresholds.
The width breakpoint classification of the current window. This value indicates which width category the window currently falls into based on the configured width breakpoint thresholds.

The height breakpoint classification of the current window. This value indicates which height category the window currently falls into based on the configured height breakpoint thresholds and aspect ratio.
The context of the navigation operation.
The id of text input component.
The uniqueId of the text input component.
Current content of text field component .
Indicates the options of NavDestination switch.
Registers a callback function to be called when the navigation destination is updated.
注释信息: @param { 'navDestinationUpdate' } type - The type of event to listen for. Must be 'navDestinationUpdate'.
@param { Callback<NavDestinationInfo> } callback - The callback function to be called when the navigation destination is updated.

parameters.说明: The type of event to listen for. Must be 'navDestinationUpdate'.
The options object.
The callback function to be called when the navigation destination is updated.

节点.功能描述: Removes a callback function that was previously registered with `on()`. navigation ID will be removed.
注释信息: @param { 'navDestinationUpdate' } type - The type of event to remove the listener for. Must be 'navDestinationUpdate'.
@param { Callback<NavDestinationInfo> } callback - The callback function to remove. If not provided, all callbacks for the given event type and

parameters.说明: The type of event to remove the listener for. Must be 'navDestinationUpdate'.
The options object.
The callback function to remove. If not provided, all callbacks for the given event type and
